entries.title: Anthropic Scales Claude AI Across 7 Small Business Apps
entries.summary: Anthropic’s Claude for Small Business plugin will bring new artificial intelligence (AI)-powered capabilities to tools commonly used by small businesses, the company and its partners said Wednesday (May 13). entries.title: Apple Prepares App Store for Autonomous AI Agents
entries.summary: Apple is exploring ways to allow developers to offer artificial intelligence (AI) agents into its App Store while maintaining its regulations designed to prevent the spread of malware and other wrongdoing, The Information reported Wednesday (May 13), citing unnamed sources. entries.title: TikTok Unleashes AI Agents on Its Ad Platform
entries.summary: Running a campaign on TikTok used to mean a media buyer inside a dashboard, manually setting up creatives, adjusting bids and shifting budgets. TikTok wants artificial intelligence agents to own that work. entries.title: The AI Coding Boom Is Breaking CFOs’ Enterprise Budgeting Cycles
entries.summary: Enterprise product development runs on assumptions about how long things take, how much they cost and who needs to sign off. The rise of agentic artificial intelligence (AI) and “vibe coding” is upending all three. entries.title: eToro Shares Slides 3% as Trade Size Halves and Assets Sits $3.8 Billion Below Peak
entries.summary: Investors gave eToro Group (NASDAQ: ETOR ) a quick double-take yesterday (Tuesday). Pre-market shares climbed roughly 6% to $41.20 on a 35% earnings beat, then reversed once the conference call started, dropping more than 6% intraday before settling at $37.61, a 3% loss for the session.
